title: kalimeris lautureana subsp. mangtaoensis
intro: Kalimeris lautureana subsp. mangtaoensis, also known as Mang Tao Kalimeris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a type of medicinal herb used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Kalimeris lautureana subsp. mangtaoensis include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to make traditional medicine remedies.
